company_name: Guenstiger India (formerly known as Wize Commerce India Pvt Ltd)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months of Internship : 20,000 per month Next 6 months of Internship after final semester results and registering on the NATS portal : 30,000 per month Salary after 1 year of Internship : CTC 5 LPA - 5.5 LPA (inclusive of 10% variable) + Individual Health insurance of sum insured of 5 Lakh + Free Breakfast and subsidized snacks and lunch + Cab facilities for both pick and drop for our official working hours i.e 7:30 am to 4:30 pm (Nearby Gurgaon areas)
